nasb.text: “The pasture lands of the cities which you shall give to the Levites shall extend from the wall of the city outward a thousand cubits around.

esv.text: The pasturelands of the cities, which you shall give to the Levites, shall reach from the wall of the city outward a thousand cubits all around.

cnv.text: “你們給利未人的城郊，要從城牆起，周圍向外量四百五十公尺。

ccb.text: 划分给利未人的草场是从城墙往外延伸四百五十米，
